# Frontguard

> AI-powered frontend visual regression testing for web teams — detect, understand, and fix visual bugs before they ship to production.

Frontguard is an open-source CLI + cloud platform. The CLI is MIT-licensed and free forever; the hosted cloud (team baselines, history, flake-score badges) is the paid tier at $29/month per user.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://frontguard.dev) — Product overview, install paths, comparison vs Percy / Chromatic / Argos
- [Pricing](https://frontguard.dev/pricing) — Free CLI ($0, MIT), Pro ($29/mo), Team/Enterprise; compare-plans matrix and the 8-question FAQ
- [Comparisons](https://frontguard.dev/comparisons) — Capability-by-capability vs Percy, Chromatic, BackstopJS, Lost Pixel, Argos, with sources
- [Changelog](https://frontguard.dev/changelog) — Notable releases, newest first (Keep a Changelog)
- [Brand](https://frontguard.dev/brand) — The amber shield mark, lockups, color tokens, typography, voice
- [Docs](https://frontguard.dev/docs) — New-brand docs surface: install, CLI, configuration, AI analysis, CI/CD, self-hosting
- [Docs articles](https://frontguard.dev/docs/index) — 37 guides at `/docs/<slug>` (install, CLI, CI/CD, self-host, comparisons)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ravidsrk/frontguard) — Source code, issues, contributing
- [npm: @frontguard/cli](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@frontguard/cli)
- [npm: @frontguard/playwright](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@frontguard/playwright)
- [Validation results](https://github.com/ravidsrk/frontguard/blob/main/validation/results-v0.2.md)

## What Frontguard Does

- Anti-flake consensus — three captures per route, majority wins; SSIM perceptual matching as fallback
- AI classification — diff goes to GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet with DOM + axe-core findings inline; structured `{category, confidence, cause}` output
- Sandbox-verified fixes — every AI patch is applied in a local Playwright sandbox (or Daytona snapshot), re-rendered, and only shipped if the diff clears
- Plugin architecture — six lifecycle hooks; built-ins for accessibility (axe-core), Figma compare, perf budgets, monitor, third-party-script drift
- CI-native — composite GitHub Action, PR comment with baseline / current / diff thumbnails; GitLab CI, CircleCI, Jenkins via the same CLI
- Self-hostable — Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2, or docker-compose on your laptop with miniflare + SQLite + local-disk adapters

## Author

Ravindra Kumar — https://github.com/ravidsrk · https://x.com/ravidsrk

## License

MIT

---

## Installation

### CLI

```bash
npm install @frontguard/cli
npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard init
npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard run --url http://localhost:3000
```

### Playwright plugin

```bash
npm install -D @frontguard/cli @frontguard/playwright
```

```ts
import { test, expect } from '@playwright/test';
import { visualTest } from '@frontguard/playwright';

test('checkout @ 375px', async ({ page }) => {
  await page.goto('http://localhost:3000/checkout');
  const result = await visualTest(page, 'checkout');
  expect(result.passed).toBe(true);
});
```

### GitHub Action

```yaml
- name: Frontguard
  uses: ravidsrk/frontguard@v0
  with:
    url: ${{ steps.preview.outputs.url }}
  env:
    FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_KEY }}
    GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
```

---

## Configuration

`frontguard.config.ts`:

```ts
import { defineConfig } from '@frontguard/cli';

export default defineConfig({
  baseUrl: 'http://localhost:3000',
  viewports: [375, 768, 1440],
  browsers: ['chromium', 'firefox', 'webkit'],
  antiFlakeRenders: 3,
  consensus: 'majority',
  ai: { provider: 'auto' }, // 'openai' | 'anthropic' | 'auto'
  baselineDir: '.frontguard/baselines',
  outputDir: '.frontguard/results',
});
```

### Environment variables

- `FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY` / `FRONTGUARD_ANTHROPIC_KEY` — AI provider key. The Playwright plugin also accepts unprefixed `OPENAI_API_KEY` / `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` when present. `frontguard doctor` reads exactly the same names the runtime reads.
- `FRONTGUARD_API_URL` / `FRONTGUARD_API_KEY` — hosted or self-hosted cloud endpoint.

---

## Pricing

- **Free CLI** — $0 forever, MIT, BYO AI key. Unlimited local screenshots, anti-flake consensus, GitHub Action + PR comment, git-orphan baselines, docker-compose self-host of the cloud.
- **Pro** — $29 per user / month. Everything in Free CLI plus hosted team baselines, run history, flake-score badges, GitHub App one-click baseline accept, spend-cap alerts at 80% / 95%, Slack and GitHub notifications.
- **Enterprise** — custom annual. SAML SSO, SCIM, audit log, on-prem deployment, dedicated support + SLA, custom Git / CI integrations.

---

## Comparison

Pulled from each vendor's documented pricing and release notes; full sources in `docs/research.md`.

| Feature | Frontguard | Percy | Chromatic | Argos |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Free tier | CLI free forever (MIT, BYO AI key) | 5,000 screenshots/mo | 5,000 snapshots/mo · Chrome-only · no a11y | 5,000 screenshots/mo · unlimited Playwright traces |
| Paid entry | Pro $29/mo | Desktop ≈ $199/mo | Starter $179/mo | Pro from $100/mo |
| Snapshot overage | Spend cap | Quote-walled | $0.008 / snapshot | $0.004 extra screenshot |
| AI diff explanation | Plain-English category + confidence + cause | Visual Review Agent (NL summaries) | No diff-classification AI | Markets "no AI overhead" |
| Sandbox-verified fixes | Patch + re-render in local Playwright / Daytona | Not advertised | Not advertised | Not advertised |
| Self-host | docker-compose recipe · MIT cloud | SaaS only | SaaS only | MIT, self-host possible from source |
| MCP server | @frontguard/mcp | Not shipped | Per-branch /mcp · Storybook 10.3+ · React | Not shipped |

---

## CI/CD examples

### GitHub Actions

```yaml
name: Visual Regression
on: [pull_request]
jobs:
  visual:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with: { node-version: 20 }
      - run: npm ci
      - run: npx playwright install --with-deps
      - run: npm run build && npm start &
      - uses: ravidsrk/frontguard@v0
        with:
          url: http://localhost:3000
        env:
          FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_KEY }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
```

### GitLab CI

```yaml
visual:
  image: mcr.microsoft.com/playwright:focal
  script:
    - npm ci
    - npm run build
    - npm start &
    - npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard run --url http://localhost:3000
  variables:
    FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY: $OPENAI_KEY
  artifacts:
    when: on_failure
    paths:
      - .frontguard/results/
```

---

## MCP server

`@frontguard/mcp` exposes the following tools to in-IDE agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Copilot):

- `list_regressions(pr_id)`
- `get_suggested_fix(diff_id)`
- `accept_baseline(run_id, confirm_all_regressions_reviewed: true)` — run-scoped, not per-diff
- `recent_runs(repo, branch)`

```bash
npx @frontguard/mcp
```

Drop into `mcp.json` per the docs at https://frontguard.dev/docs/integrations/mcp.

---

## Self-host

Cloud stack runs locally:

```bash
docker compose -f packages/cloud-api/docker-compose.yml up
```

Maps to miniflare for the Worker runtime, SQLite in place of D1, and a local-disk adapter in place of R2.

---

## FAQ

### How do I install Frontguard?

`npm install @frontguard/cli`, then `npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard init`, then `npx -p @frontguard/cli frontguard run --url <your URL>`.

### How does Frontguard handle cross-OS rendering differences?

Playwright's own docs warn rendering varies by OS and hardware. Frontguard ships a pinned Docker renderer image (Chromium / Firefox / WebKit + system fonts). Enable with `frontguard run --docker`.

### Can I self-host the cloud?

Yes. The cloud is MIT-licensed and runs locally via `docker-compose up`.

### What env vars does Frontguard read?

`FRONTGUARD_OPENAI_KEY` / `FRONTGUARD_ANTHROPIC_KEY` for AI. `FRONTGUARD_API_URL` / `FRONTGUARD_API_KEY` for the cloud.

### Does Frontguard work with Storybook?

Yes. `frontguard init` detects `.storybook/main.ts` and scaffolds a Storybook-aware config. The adapter runs each story's `play()` function.

### Is there an MCP server?

`@frontguard/mcp` exposes `list_regressions`, `get_suggested_fix`, `accept_baseline`, `recent_runs`.

### Data retention?

CLI sends screenshots only to your configured AI provider. On the hosted cloud, default retention is 30 days on Pro; configurable up to 1 year on Enterprise.

---
